name: Kaniehtí:io
description: From Assassin's Creed III - Kaniehtí:io, colloquially known as Ziio, was a Kanien'kehá:ka warrior from the village of Kanatahséton. Unlike her fellow villagers, who preferred to stay neutral to protect their sacred sanctuary, she sought to fight the British encroaching on her people's lands. In 1754, Kaniehtí:io gained an ally in the Templar Haytham Kenway, who sought access to her people's sanctuary. The two shared a brief relationship, which resulted in the conception and birth of a son, whom she named Ratonhnhaké:ton.
creator: Charlize_Lee
